SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BERENSTEIN, SIDNEY SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR KIRCHER, GERDA

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-08-2001 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-13-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DEPT. 503A. DENNIS P. ISAAC. PRO TEM JUDGE, M. ECHEVERRIA, CLRK. BELDON YEE, CSR PARTIES PRESENT: PLTF. ATTY SIDNEY BERENSTEIN AND DEFT. DOUGLAS DIMARCO, PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. AGAINST DEFT. FOR RESTITUTION OF 1685 SACRAMENTO S. F, CA. AND FOR MONEY DAMAGE OF $1095.63 PLUS COURT COST OF $101. DEFT. TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE 8/30/01; IF DEFT. COMPLIES, PLTF. TO DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA DIMARCO, DOUGLAS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIMARCO, DOUGLAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1685 SACRAMENTO ST. #23, S.F. CA. $1,095.63 RENT, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,196.63, LEASE FORFEITED, A WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, BUT DEFENDANT SHALL NOT BE EVICTED PRIOR TO 8/30/01, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
